name: Scratch and Peck Feeds Naturally Free Organic Starter Chicken & Duck Feed
description: Give your growing chicks and ducklings the nutrition and taste they need to thrive with the Scratch and Peck Naturally Free Organic Starter Chicken Food. Formulated with organic, raw whole grains like wheat and barley, plus nutrient-rich meals like sesame, flax and kelp, it’s a complete and balanced feed for starting poultry chicks and ducklings. Naturally free of soy, corn or fillers, it packs more nutrition in every peck—like omegas, vitamins, minerals, probiotics and essential amino acids. Plus, it’s sourced and made in the USA with never any GMO foods.
